programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Kas notiek Latvijā?
programme.desc: Diskusijas un intervijas par sabiedrībai nozīmīgām norisēm. Vada žurnālists Jānis Domburs.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: 1:1. Aktuālā intervija
programme.desc: Raidījumā "1:1" [viens pret vienu] satiekas sabiedrībā zināma personība un žurnālists. Raidījums skaidro, analizē un ļauj izprast sabiedrībai nozīmīgas norises visdažādākajās dzīves jomās Latvijā un pasaulē, izprast personības nozīmīgumu, atbildību šo procesu virzībā. Viesi izvēlēti, ņemot vērā tā brīža aktualitātes vai arī konkrētās personas iespējamo ietekmi uz notikumiem nākotnē, – valsts pirmās amatpersonas, biznesa, kultūras un nevalstiskā sektora pārstāvji. Raidījumu vada žurnālists Gundars Rēders.

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Jānis Jenzis, Latvijas Restorānu biedrības prezidents, uzņēmējs, esot apveltīts ar dabisku viesmīlības talantu un rūpēm par apkārtējiem. Bērnībā ārstējis visus dzīvniekus un jau pusaudža gados asistējis veterināriem, pats sapņodams par dzīvnieku daktera profesiju, taču liktenis viņu pagriezis gluži citā ceļā. Restorāni, viesnīcas, tūrisms ir Jenža darbības jomas, kurās iegūti arī bakalaura un maģistra grādi, un šodien viņa vadītāja un uzņēmēja pieredze turpinās daudzos sabiedrības labbūtības projektos. Maija sākumā uzņēmējs viesojas raidījumā "Daudz laimes, jubilār!". "Rūpes par otru cilvēku Jānim ir ļoti dabiskas, tas ir viņa viesmīlības talants - pamanīt cilvēku un to, kas nepieciešams viņa komfortam. Jānis rūpēsies un apkalpos tā, lai radītu patīkamu sajūtu kopīgai sarunai vai - vienkārši tāpat," Jenža empātisko vērību raksturo gan restorānu īpašnieks un šefpavārs Mārtiņš Sirmais, gan arī Latvijas Nacionālā simfoniskā orķestra direktore Indra Lūkina. Abi Jānī Jenzī pirmkārt izceļ tieši viesmīlības prasmi. "Viņš to, protams, ir attīstījis, izaudzējis, šajā biznesā būdams ļoti ilgus gadus," turpina Mārtiņš Sirmais. "Bet nav ne mazāko šaubu, ka viesmīlība ir arī viņa īpašais talants, dabas dots. Ne velti tieši viņš bija Andreja Žagara galvenais vietnieks gan "Osiris", gan vēlāk citos restorānos," stāsta Sirmais, kas arī savulaik kā jauns students stažējies leģendārajā "Osiris" - pirmajā Rietumu gaumes un kvalitātes restorānā Rīgā pēc valsts neatkarības atjaunošanas, ko Žagars izveidoja 1994. gadā. Žagara skolu izgājis, viņa vizionāra skatiena un vēriena ietekmēts, arī Jenzis pats savulaik atvēris vairākus augstas kvalitātes restorānus, taču 2018. gadā pārdevis, vairāk koncentrējoties Restorānu biedrībai, pasniedzēja darbam, kā arī savam "sirdsdarbam" - mūzikai. Proti, būdams viens no Nacionālā simfoniskā orķestra fonda dibinātājiem un, kā saka Indra Lūkina, "fonda lokomotīve", Jānis iniciējis un vada daudz dažādu labdarības akciju un projektu gan visas Latvijas mūzikas skolu audzēkņu izaugsmei, gan ielu bērnu un slimu cilvēku atbalstam, gan arī orķestra mūziķu dzīves labbūtības veidošanai. "Opera un akadēmiskā mūzika ir mana mīlestība kopš jaunības," Jeznis atklāj. "Savulaik mamma mani veda uz operu un teātri, tie bija "obligātie pasākumi". Taču klikšķis vienā brīdī notika, šķiet, kad man bija gadi seši: tā bija Džuzepes Verdi "Traviata" ar Elgu Brahmani Violetas lomā." Raidījumā Jānis un skatītāji varēs atsaukt atmiņā ne tikai Brahmanes Violetu, bet arī Raimonda Paula "Dziesmu par pēdējo lapu", daudz muzikālu, labdarības un aizrautības stāstu no cilvēka, kurš sapņojis par veterināra karjeru, bet nokļuvis gluži citā jomā un daudz dara sabiedrības garīgās un fiziskās veselības labā.

programme.title: Kultūršoks
programme.desc: Kultūra ir ne vien māksla, bet arī nauda, projekti, ražošana un gan radoši, gan postoši konflikti. Par kultūrvides problēmām un šokējošām atklāsmēm — raidījums "Kultūršoks".

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies viena no Rīgas Fotogrāfijas biennāles izstāžu kuratorēm un Latvijas Mākslas gada balvas par mūža ieguldījumu saņēmēja Irēna Bužinska, kā arī režisori Rūdolfs Gediņš un Kristīne Brīniņa, kuri ar savām izrādēm piedalīsies Baltijas Vizuālā teātra skatē.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officials at El Dorado International Airport, in Bogota, Colombia, continue to foil the most audacious attempts at drug trafficking. On this new season of Airport Alert, they must detect sophisiticated new drug smuggling methods, arrest luggage thieves and detain suspects with international arrest warrants, while also dealing with medical emergencies, document forgery and cases of identity theft. Ranked as one of the 23 best airpots in the world, El Dorado is one of the biggest and most dynamic air terminals in Latin America. The airport serves 25 million passengers and handles 200,000 tons of cargo every year in its 1,100-hectare facility. Things are moving day and night, and appearances can be deceiving. Airport Alert follows agents 24/7 and captures their efforts to ensure the security of passengers and cargo alike.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport workers find lost items, including a purse stuffed with jewelry, two competitive ballroom dresses, a headphone case holding $1,200 and a mysterious matching set of luggage stuffed with produce. In Alabama, an avid Unclaimed Baggage shopper shares some of her greatest finds, including a diamond ring she bought for $4,500 thats now worth $20,000.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport workers reunite travelers with their missing items, including a sentimental 40th-anniversary gift and a wallet brimming with $1,500 in cash. A man breaks into a song of gratitude when his two laptops are returned to him. Agents in Denver discover a bag packed with rotting fish and put on their detective hats to hunt for the owner of a jewelry box full of treasures.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport Lost and Found workers reunite travelers with a dog who wiggled out of his leash upon arrival and wandered the airport grounds for a week, a collection of vintage tennis rackets belonging to a pro tennis player, a purse containing over a hundred dollars in cash, a backpack brimming with lifesaving prescription medicine, a childs beloved stuffed panda bear, and a full Army uniform.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The Age of Dinosaurs - an ancient world of savage, lone T-rexes terrorizing dopey plant-eating diplodocus. So familiar… but so wrong. From the colours of their skin to the way they flock and herd, so much of what we think is true about dinosaurs is either out of date, guesswork, or all-out fantasy. Now a new generation of palaeontologists, armed with the latest tech, are challenging these popular caricatures to uncover the Real Jurassic Americas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Archaeologists explore the coast of Oregon for the remains of a ship that sank over three hundred years ago. Native American oral histories tell of a shipwreck and its survivors. Porcelain and beeswax from the ship still wash up on shore. Archaeologists reconstruct their impression of the sunken wreck, using historical data and their own expertise, revealing how this giant ship carried hundreds of tons of cargo nearly halfway round the world.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will heads to the South Pole, where temperatures can drop below minus 100 degrees Fahrenheit. He skis and treks across giant icefields, and, faced with a giant cliff of ice in bone-chilling winds, struggles to climb to the top. Only with the support of one of the worlds best polar athletes, Richard Parks, does he succeed. In one of the planets most isolated research stations, scientists take ice cores deep under the surface and make incredible sacrifices to pursue their research.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will, a man scared of spiders his whole life, ventures deep into the Ecuadorian Amazon on an expedition in search of deadly creatures. Joined by professor Bryan Fry and local mountaineer Carla Perez, they abseil 200 feet into a cave network known as the "womb of the Earth," where they discover a giant tarantula. Using cutting-edge techniques, they extract its venom, which could hold the key to saving millions of lives.

programme.title: Historys Secrets
programme.desc: In 1953, a US Army scientist working on biological weapons, Dr. Frank Olson, falls to his death from his hotel window under suspicious circumstances. Almost twenty years later, the US government offers Olsons family a $750,000 pay-out, revealing that he died because of his involvement in a secret CIA experiment studying the use of LSD and interrogation—an offshoot of a series of mind control experiments called MK-ULTRA. Go behind the true extent of these secret CIA experiments and their casualties.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The no-fear gene: In a country where the punishment for espionage is death, a young CIA officer — and the real-life inspiration for Carrie Matheson from "Homeland" — is kidnapped at gunpoint during a routine intel exchange. Isolated and under threat, she must rely on her training and instincts to survive a tense 24-hour standoff that could end in catastrophe.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: October 1993. Keni Thomas and Randy Ramaglia are among a squad of US Rangers and Delta Force who rope down from Black Hawk helicopters into the capital of war-ravaged Somalia. Their mission: to capture two top lieutenants of rebel leader Mohamed Aidid. But the daring raid goes disastrously wrong when Black Hawk Super 6-1 is shot down over the city. The ground troops are sent to secure the crash sites but they are outgunned and overrun, sustaining multiple casualties. When Super 6-4 pilot Mike Durant flies in to help, his Black hawk is shot down too. His crew dead, he is captured and held for 11 days. The infamous Battle of Mogadishu sees 18 Americans dead and 73 injured.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: Its June 1964 - the start of the Vietnam War. US Navy pilot Lt Charles Klusmann is flying an unarmed photo-reconnaissance mission over communist guerilla territory in neighboring Laos. His RF-8 Crusader is shot down by the enemy, ambushed and imprisoned by the Pathet Lao.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Explorer Albert Lin searches Israel for the lost city of the Canaanites, a mysterious civilisation who survived a biblical era, climate apocalypse. The expedition takes him scuba diving for 4000-year-old shipwreck treasure and through a terrifying incident on a crumbling cliff face. Using extraordinary tech, Albert reveals a spectacular maritime world, built by these ancient climate survivors.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: First century AD and the Romans dominate much of the known world. But their plans to conquer Scotland are foiled by a band of barbarian insurgents called the Picts. Explorer, Albert Lin scales sea cliffs, explores caverns, swims rapids and uses high-tech scanners to discover a lost kingdom that may answer how the mysterious Picts were behind one of the greatest military upsets of their time.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: First century AD and the Romans dominate much of the known world. But their plans to conquer Scotland are foiled by a band of barbarian insurgents called the Picts. Explorer, Albert Lin scales sea cliffs, explores caverns, swims rapids and uses high-tech scanners to discover a lost kingdom that may answer how the mysterious Picts were behind one of the greatest military upsets of their time.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: The Roman Empire was truly global, covering thousands of miles and thousands of inhabitants. New archaeological discoveries paint a clearer picture everyday life back then. A lavish Pompeii villa, preserved in time by the eruption of Vesuvius, showcases the very different lives between the wealthy who lived there and the enslaved who ran the operation. In Jordan, an untouched tomb is uncovered; its art tells the story of the citys history, revealing the cultural melting pot of citizens in a city at the edge of the empire. In that same town, archaeologists analyze the construction of a theater where all citizens were welcome. Final

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: Built on ambition and driven by ingenuity, the Roman Empire developed innovations that are still being studied today in new archaeological discoveries. Experts explore the Stabian Baths of Pompeii, which are extraordinarily preserved from the eruption of Vesuvius. Its pristine state allows archaeologists to study the remarkable mechanics of the heating systems behind this important meeting place, built over two millennia ago. In the heart of Rome, right next to the Vatican, a magnificent amphitheater built for Emperor Neros personal pleasure boasts his ostentatious pride in bold displays of power. Outside Naples, underwater archeologists dive into the Bay of Puteoli to discover a granary, a cornerstone of the grain trade whose profits fueled ambitious constructions all throughout the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Naming the Dead
programme.desc: Across the United States, more than 50,000 bodies remain unidentified—unmourned, unnamed, but not forgotten. "Naming The Dead", a riveting new six-part investigative series from National Geographic, brings these untold stories to light. The series follows the groundbreaking work of the DNA Doe Project, a trailblazing nonprofit that uses genetic genealogy to help law enforcement crack the countrys most confounding cold cases.

programme.title: Naming the Dead
programme.desc: Across the United States, more than 50,000 bodies remain unidentified—unmourned, unnamed, but not forgotten. "Naming The Dead", a riveting new six-part investigative series from National Geographic, brings these untold stories to light. The series follows the groundbreaking work of the DNA Doe Project, a trailblazing nonprofit that uses genetic genealogy to help law enforcement crack the countrys most confounding cold cases.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: In March 2011, as Japan reels from the most powerful earthquake in its history, a 14 metre-high tsunami surges over the Fukushima Dai-ichi nuclear power plant, knocking out its power supply and essential cooling systems. With the plant blacked out, engineers face nuclear meltdown. The reactors begin to overheat leading to two huge explosions that tear the plant apart and dispersing radiation. As Japan faces the worst nuclear emergency since Chernobyl, an international nuclear expert will investigate exactly what happed at Fukushima and see what, if anything, could have been done to prevent it.

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: Tudor Historian Dr. Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley team up to investigate three of historys most mysterious MURDERS. How did legendary warrior-king Attila the Hun end up dead the morning after his wedding? Did Richard III really kill his own young nephews in the Tower of London? And who was behind the mafia-style hit that took out Juan Borgia - son of Romes Godfather, Pope Alexander VI.

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: What links a Scottish National hero, a Danish Viking Warrior and a Nazi SS Officer? All three experienced unusual and barbaric deaths by execution. In BLOODY TALES - EXECUTIONS, Tudor historian Dr Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley team up to investigate three extraordinary stories. Did it take three attempts to execute Amon Goeth, the Nazi commander of a labour camp in World War 2; was the Viking Ragnar Lodbrok really killed by a pit full of snakes? And did William Wallaces punishment of death by hanging drawing and quartering, really fit the crime?

programme.title: Naming the Dead
programme.desc: Across the United States, more than 50,000 bodies remain unidentified—unmourned, unnamed, but not forgotten. "Naming The Dead", a riveting new six-part investigative series from National Geographic, brings these untold stories to light. The series follows the groundbreaking work of the DNA Doe Project, a trailblazing nonprofit that uses genetic genealogy to help law enforcement crack the countrys most confounding cold cases.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey through Spains greatest feats of engineering. From the awe-inspiring technology thats bringing Barcelonas iconic Sagrada Familia to completion, to the secrets of Sevilles record-breaking wooden sun shade. Marvel at a gravity-defying skyscraper that seems to hover in the sky, and step back in time as a 2,000-year-old Roman theatre is nursed back to life.

programme.title: Engineering Europe
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Polands most awe-inspiring engineering marvels. Watch as a super port rises from the depths of the sea, and uncover the secrets behind the tallest building in the European Union. Descend into the shadows beneath Wieliczka, where a sprawling city-sized mine lies hidden, then witness the towering legacy of the worlds tallest wooden structure.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: This spectacular aerial journey reveals Denmark as its never been seen before. Flying cameras uncover a state-of-the-art power plant with a ski slope on its roof, soar above a procession by the Royal Familys elite guards and see repairs to unique houses found nowhere else on Earth. Well explore the many islands that make up this small nation and discover a castle so infamous that it inspired Shakespeare to write his play Hamlet.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europes finest cultural and geographical landmarks as youve never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europes finest cultural and geographical landmarks as youve never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP MIA finds a package of ecstasy in the mail; HSI conducts a controlled delivery leading to a stakeout and arrest. CBP at LAX monitor travelers arriving for a popular music festival where there is known drug use. CBP JFK searches a passenger with possible connections to known drug dealers. After poking holes through his story, officers decide to take him for an x-ray to find out the truth once and for all.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Bible
programme.desc: Nineveh and Babylon were two superpowers of the ancient world but for the writers of the Bible they were the cities of sin. Why do they have such poor reputations in the Old Testament and what were these cities really like? Our cameras have rare access to discoveries at Nineveh, in modern Mosul, the setting for the story of Jonah and the whale. Here archaeologists are rebuilding the citys mighty gates and piecing together lost wonders destroyed by Islamic State. At Babylon, we follow specialists restoring the Ishtar Gate, built by Nebuchadnezzar II, one of the most notorious tyrants of the Old Testament. The rivalry between Nineveh and Babylon determined the fate of the ancient world could their conquests also lie behind their terrible reputations in the Bible?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Noah and the Great Flood is one of the Bibles best-known tales. Now, investigators seek to unravel the storys origins, which may predate the Old Testament. They explore some of the earliest cities in Mesopotamia, use the latest science to examine past climates, decipher clay tablets, and put an ancient blueprint of the Ark to the test. Immersive CGI brings this long-lost story to life.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The legend of David and Goliath is one of the Bibles most famous stories. It tells of a battle between a young shepherd boy and a nine-foot-tall warrior. Now, teams of archaeologists investigate the real world behind this epic showdown. At Tel Azekah, excavators uncover the remains of an ancient city, destroyed by a devastating fire. In Egypt, inscriptions from the Temple of Karnak hint at the surprising origins of the Philistines, some of the Bibles most fearsome warriors, and at the ruined city of Gath, excavators uncover a fragment of pottery with two ancient names. Did a real Goliath live in this city?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air traffic controllers hear an explosion when Air Algerie Flight 6289 lifts off from a remote desert airport. And moments later, the Boeing 737-200 crashes in the Sahara. An intense fire ravages the fuselage, instantly killing all but one of the 103 people on board. For an international team of investigators, its clear the left engine exploded after liftoff—and that a fatigue crack eventually explains why. Whats less obvious is why the highly-experienced crew of the state-owned national carrier was unable to keep their aircraft in the sky. Single-engine failures are infinitely survivable, and the pilots should have been able to recover by working together. Investigators ultimately find their answer in the CVR and in a toxic tug-of-war between a belligerent captain working at cross purposes with Algerias first-ever female airline pilot.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to Salt Lake City, Delta Airlines Flight 1141 crashes just moments after lifting off from Dallas-Fort Worth airport and erupts into flames. Of the 108 people on board, 94 make it off the plane alive while 14 die trying to escape the smoke and flames. Its clear that neither the runway nor the weather is to blame, so investigators know theres a problem with either the plane itself or its configuration.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: This episode of Ancient X Files investigates what advances in science since the last time the shroud was tested, in 1988, might reveal about this mysterious religious relic. Developments in photo-imaging may have revealed letters hidden around the head. But who wrote them and why? One scientist believes he may have discovered that the image itself was created by a huge burst of electrical energy. Also in this episode, the discovery of a strange, buried structure dating back 4000 years could be the oldest temple in the Americas.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: For centuries, archeologists have searched for these original "cities of sin" supposedly destroyed by the wrath of God. But have the experts been looking in the wrong place all these years? Archaeological excavations have uncovered the scorched remains of ancient pottery shards super-heated in a catastrophic event with the intensity of a nuclear blast. Could this be evidence of a supernatural intervention? Then, head to Italy to explore the darkest secrets of Rome, Venice and Milan as author Nick Pelling attempts to decode what has been called "the most mysterious text in the world" - the Voynich Text. Filled with cryptic lettering and bizarre imagery, the document has stumped historians and code breakers for over a century, but Pelling believes he can succeed where others have failed and finally decode this strange text.

programme.title: Secret Bible
programme.desc: They were said to own the Holy Grail, to know the bloodline of Jesus, and to have discovered the New World… a century before Columbus! They have been called "the most secret society on earth". The Knights Templar was Europes most powerful religious body in the Middle Ages. From their headquarters in Jerusalem and Paris, the Templars created what some believe to have been modern banking - financing Popes, Kings and empires, while promoting religious faith and good works. But, when the Templars ran afoul of the French King, they were declared traitors, devil-worshippers, and worse. Conspiracy theorists believe their suppression and underground activities were the source of Freemasonry and other secret societies, which still hold power today. Examine the history of a powerful religious organization, now almost forgotten, and see how and why this long-dead institution still captures the imagination of the world!

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Nineveh was once the worlds greatest city. The Bible describes it as a wicked city of sinners, from which Jonah flees and is swallowed by a whale. This season, archaeologists in Iraq and Israel uncover never-before-seen stone reliefs and make a shocking discovery inside Ninevehs city gate: the skeletons of two teenagers brutally killed in battle. Did the city deserve its fearsome reputation?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The legend of David and Goliath is one of the Bibles most famous stories. It tells of a battle between a young shepherd boy and a nine-foot-tall warrior. Now, teams of archaeologists investigate the real world behind this epic showdown. At Tel Azekah, excavators uncover the remains of an ancient city, destroyed by a devastating fire. In Egypt, inscriptions from the Temple of Karnak hint at the surprising origins of the Philistines, some of the Bibles most fearsome warriors, and at the ruined city of Gath, excavators uncover a fragment of pottery with two ancient names. Did a real Goliath live in this city?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Iraq, archaeologists investigate the truth behind the legendary city of Babylon. First discovered in the 1800s, this vast ancient metropolis was home to extraordinary structures and a long line of notorious rulers. Babylon is one of the most famous cities in the Bible, mentioned hundreds of times, from the first book of Genesis to Revelation. But why did it have such a hold over the writers of the Bible? International teams of experts investigate ancient cities across Mesopotamia, which could shed light on this mystery. From the cultural wonders and dramatic history of Nineveh to the extraordinary ziggurat at Dur-Kurigalzu, exploring these sites helps reveal the real world of Babylon and illuminate why it was such a source of inspiration and fascination for the Bibles authors.

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: Who fatally shot Italian Fascist dictator Benito Mussolini, without trial, after his capture by partisans, and why? What happened to the treasure he carried with him, or was that the motive, perhaps documents that could discredit Churchill? - Was the most famous highwayman in Cromwells republic executed as a traitor just for robbing notably parliamentarians, or executed for stubbornly proclaiming to remain an royalist, or did the Lord Protector carry a personal grudge beyond law? - Who laid the bomb that nearly blow up Napoleon Bonaparte, then Fisrt Consul, in his coach, and why? Did his security minister Fouche play a two-faced part?

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: From ancient times to the Second World War, Europe has been soaked in blood and intrigue. In this fascinating new series, Bloody Tales goes beyond the British Isles to seek out the Europes most grisly history to discover the mysterious true stories behind some of historys most infamous tales. From East to West, from the UK to Istanbul, join historian Dr Suzannah Lipscomb and presenter Joe Crowley to investigate subjects that include Romes famously cruel emperor Caligula and the notoriously violent Vikings. Using re-enactments, revisiting iconic locations and relying upon world-leading experts, can Suzannah and Joe sort fact from myth and rewrite some of historys greatest stories?

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: This episode of Ancient X Files investigates what advances in science since the last time the shroud was tested, in 1988, might reveal about this mysterious religious relic. Developments in photo-imaging may have revealed letters hidden around the head. But who wrote them and why? One scientist believes he may have discovered that the image itself was created by a huge burst of electrical energy. Also in this episode, the discovery of a strange, buried structure dating back 4000 years could be the oldest temple in the Americas.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP MIA finds a package of ecstasy in the mail; HSI conducts a controlled delivery leading to a stakeout and arrest. CBP at LAX monitor travelers arriving for a popular music festival where there is known drug use. CBP JFK searches a passenger with possible connections to known drug dealers. After poking holes through his story, officers decide to take him for an x-ray to find out the truth once and for all.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protections residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle hes ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air traffic controllers hear an explosion when Air Algerie Flight 6289 lifts off from a remote desert airport. And moments later, the Boeing 737-200 crashes in the Sahara. An intense fire ravages the fuselage, instantly killing all but one of the 103 people on board. For an international team of investigators, its clear the left engine exploded after liftoff—and that a fatigue crack eventually explains why. Whats less obvious is why the highly-experienced crew of the state-owned national carrier was unable to keep their aircraft in the sky. Single-engine failures are infinitely survivable, and the pilots should have been able to recover by working together. Investigators ultimately find their answer in the CVR and in a toxic tug-of-war between a belligerent captain working at cross purposes with Algerias first-ever female airline pilot.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to Salt Lake City, Delta Airlines Flight 1141 crashes just moments after lifting off from Dallas-Fort Worth airport and erupts into flames. Of the 108 people on board, 94 make it off the plane alive while 14 die trying to escape the smoke and flames. Its clear that neither the runway nor the weather is to blame, so investigators know theres a problem with either the plane itself or its configuration.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: Ruff N Tumble. Sometimes taking care of critters can be a little ruff. Scarlett the Labrador Retriever has a torn-up paw, while PeeWee the chihuahua has eye and prostate issues.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: We start on the tiny island of Batan, meeting a unique viper and a ubiquitous but also giant, land crab. Luzon is the main island of the Philippines. We drop in to Mindoro to see the most endangered large mammal in the Philippines, the tamaraw.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. We also see how people can mediate between people and wildlife as we join a snake hunting team catching and translocating a deadly Samar cobra.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: We start on the tiny island of Batan, meeting a unique viper and a ubiquitous but also giant, land crab. Luzon is the main island of the Philippines. We drop in to Mindoro to see the most endangered large mammal in the Philippines, the tamaraw.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Americas Wild Spaces
programme.desc: This show explores the unbridled natural beauty of Americas national parks and highlights some of the most awe-inspiring scenery on the planet. Travelling beyond the more conventional tourist hot-spots, the viewer is transported to the hidden wonders of Americas wild spaces. Episodes include joining a scientific exploration of the 277 mile long Grand Canyon, studying its geological history, exploring the microscopic colonies of vegetation and examining its unique creatures; journeying through the Everglades, a 1.5 million acre home to strange creatures, carnivorous plants, amphibious birds and fish that can breathe air; and navigating across the northwest archipelago of Hawaii following a team of diving scientists as they inspect the unique aquaeous flora and fauna.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a rich and diverse land. Stunning landscapes harbor elusive critters that have evolved to thrive here. But survival is not assured because the abundant prey is closely followed by powerful predators. From giant killer dolphins to the largest cat in the Americas, this vast continent is a lethal predator battleground.

programme.desc: Rhino Romance. Celebrate World Rhino Day with the rhinos of Zoo Tampa! Meet the resident greater one-horned rhino couple, Jamie and Johnny, as they tackle life together.

programme.title: Thailands Wild Side
programme.desc: Thailands Wild Life is a documentary series revolving around amazing wildlife of Thailand. It follows the fortunes of some of countrys most charismatic wild creatures as they face the biggest challenges of their lives: The Hunting Game and The Mating Game. Discover how these exotic animals bring up their young, search for partners, fight for survival, and face the constant challenge of finding food in Thailands jungles, mountains and wetlands.

programme.title: Thailands Wild Side
programme.desc: Thailands Wild Life is a documentary series revolving around amazing wildlife of Thailand. Discover how these exotic animals bring up their young, search for partners, fight for survival, and face the constant challenge of finding food in Thailands jungles, mountains and wetlands.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South Americas Weirdest Animals dives into the depths of the South American wild to investigate the cast of misfits, the oddities, the weird, the eccentric and the truly bizarre. The landscape here is truly one of a kind. So, the animals have evolved accordingly. In the South American wild, strange problems gave rise to even stranger solutions.

programme.title: South America Untamed
programme.desc: An amazing journey through South America including never-before-seen footage of piranhas, macaws, giant river otters and Andean bears.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: A young jaguar is about to embark on the most important mission of his life, : to strike out and find a kingdom of his own. His journey will take him through varied habitats, each with its own cast of animals. Only if he can prove his worth will the jaguar be able to claim his throne in one of the last truly wild paradises on the planet.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. This ancient land is governed by competing clans of ruthlessly proficient predators - leopards, lions, hyenas and wild dogs. Their survival depends on the giant herds of powerful prey - buffalo, elephant and zebra - who have roamed Savute in search of sustenance, season after season, millennium after millennium. Each day is a life-or-death struggle - animal against animal, animal against nature. There is no mercy, and there is but one rule: survive. The first episode follows Saba the leopard. Saba haunts the trees and hills in the heart of the realm. She is solitary, silent, virtually invisible - and a killer without rival. Narrated by Charles Dance.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute is a land where natural law is taken to its limit and sometimes... beyond. Across six episodes we see the full impact that the cycle of Savutes seasons has on every carnivore clan. The rains leave a time of birth and plenty in their wake, but all too soon the soil is parched and the grass gone. Rival tribes of predators are squeezed into a cauldron of competition. This season in Savute, who will survive?

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Hungry crocs battle a dangerous pod of hippos. The hippos take on a group of male lions. A honey badger battles for life against leopards, and wild dogs cause chaos everywhere they go! In the wilds of Southern Africa, the long, dry winter brings a desperation to the animals who live here. Prepare yourself for a highly charged, emotional and informative ride.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: When the savannah turns into a battleground, its hard to choose a hero. Were on the edge of our safari seats as a leopard is cornered by a pride of lions, a young impala is hurled into the air by a hippo and two hyenas try to drown each other. Then, the rarest of sightings as an Aardvark runs for its life from a brown hyaena. Who will win when its tooth versus claw?

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Life in the African bush is a constant struggle for survival. When babies are born, mothers show incredible courage to protect them from danger.

Across six episodes we see the full impact that the cycle of Savutes seasons has on every carnivore clan. The rains leave a time of birth and plenty in their wake, but all too soon the soil is parched and the grass gone. Rival tribes of predators are squeezed into a cauldron of competition. This season in Savute, who will survive?

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Hungry crocs battle a dangerous pod of hippos. The hippos take on a group of male lions. A honey badger battles for life against leopards, and wild dogs cause chaos everywhere they go! In the wilds of Southern Africa, the long, dry winter brings a desperation to the animals who live here. Prepare yourself for a highly charged, emotional and informative ride.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: When the savannah turns into a battleground, its hard to choose a hero. Were on the edge of our safari seats as a leopard is cornered by a pride of lions, a young impala is hurled into the air by a hippo and two hyenas try to drown each other. Then, the rarest of sightings as an Aardvark runs for its life from a brown hyaena. Who will win when its tooth versus claw?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem ir garlaicīgi, jo ārā līst lietus. Bet vecāki zina, ka vajag tikai nedaudz iztēles, lai varētu izklaidēties aŗī lietū. Bērniem iztēle ir lieliska, varbūt pat pārāk... // Barbagudrais radīja dekoderi, kurš spēj iztulkot dzīvnieku skaņas, bet dzīvnieki fermā un pagalmā neko interesantu nesaka. Barbazū lūdz iztulkot okeāna iemītnieku valodu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pastāsta pārējiem, cik vareni bija Da Vinči izgudrojumi un nu katrs grib izgudrot ko savu. Ģēniju ir maz, bet ir jautri izgudrot. // Bērniem jāizvēlas - doties baseinā vai izbraukt ar riteņiem. Uzreiz izveidojas divas frontes un tikai Barbazū spēj nosvērt izvēles svarus.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Megameistars izaicina mēru Greitveju piedalīties triku sacensībās, Rabla komanda būvē satriecošas triku rampas. Kad elektrības traucējumi apdraud Sjerras Spīdošās koncertu, ķepaiņi izmanto lielos braucamos, lai atgrieztu elektrību.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad auto vadītājai Kamilai vajag vietu, kur paēst, kucēniem un Karlam rodas eleganta ideja. Bet vai tā nav pārāk eleganta? // Reindžere Roza un kaza Rozija gatavojas koncertam! Taču, kad Rozija pazūd, vai kucēniem izdosies viņu atrast?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Lilijas nāriņu ballīte tiek atsaukta, kad sāk līt. Laiks celtniecības risinājumam!

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais izturas dīvaini. Ko viņš slēpj? Barbabērni darīs visu, lai to uzzinātu. Barbapapas izlemj taupīt elektrību, taču viņu ieceri izjauc Barbagudrais un Barbabella, kas izgudrojuši slepenu elektrību patērējošu projektu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbazū gatavs palīdzēt, bet Barbagudrais un Barbabella ļaunprātīgi izmanto viņa labestību un padara viņu traku. Barbazū nejauši atklāj spēju atdarināt Barbatēti. Viņš to izmanto, lai sadalītu darbus brāļiem un māsām. Vai viņi to uzzinās?

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Reindžere Roza lūdz Rabla komandu salabot Lāču salas tiltu. Kad remontdarbos iejaucas Ātrmeistars, ķepaiņiem jāsatīra viņa radītā nekārtība un jāpasargā lāčus no ātri tuvojošās vētras... ar tantes Celtnes jaunās Būvētavas Bultas palīdzību.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Autokinoteātrī tiek izrādīta jauna Supervāveres filma. Kad Ātrmeistars sarīko kārtējo jezgu, ķepaiņiem jārīkojas, lai glābtu situāciju. Ir Tanšu diena! Vai ķepaiņi paspēs uzbūvēt dāvanu tantei Celtnei?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dorai, Zābaciņam un Benijam jādodas cauri lietusmežam, lai nogādātu Benija vecmammai lielu, skaistu piena kūku. Dora palīdz Fiestas trio noskaidrot, kas rada skaļo, savādo troksni, kura dēļ viņi pazaudējuši savus instrumentus.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei. Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu. Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda gatava nomainīt salauzto teleskopa lēcu Observatorijā - līdz piegādes laikā sākas ugunīgs fiasko! // Karla kaķēni izraisa būvniecības haosu Buvētavā! Vai komandai izdosies atrast risinājumu kaķu katastrofai?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš satiek vientuļniekvēzīti Šelliju, kura pazaudējusi savu čaulu un paslēpjas Zābaciņa zābakā. Dora dodas meklēt Šellijas mitekli. Tētis rīko kesadilju pikniku, bet ir aizmirsis mājās visas sastāvdaļas! Dora apņemas tās aizgādāt.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tija un Tomijs cenšas pārliecināt mammu un tēti par labu mīlulim.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Tomijs cenšas izaudzēt vislielāko astro-ķirbi.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Tomijs izpalīdz Dino-veikalā.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs grib būt labs viesis Deizijas dzimšanas dienas ballītē, tā kā tādā vēl nekad nav bijis. Steigdamies paspēt uz koncertu, Krokodilkungs un Deizija mammas iepakošanas un nosūtīšanas veikalā pazaudē biļetes.

Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo neprot zīmēt. Viņam piemetas žagas, no kurām netiek vaļā. Viņš jau grasās padoties, kad nejauši rada jaunu mākslas novirzienu. Barbaliba grib piedalīties rakstīšanas konkursā, taču brāļi un māsas neļauj koncentrēties.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā

programme.title: Dora

programme.title: Dora

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā Halovīnā Krokodilkungs pārģērbjas par Superkrokodilu un cenšas attaisnot savu jauno identitāti. Deizija un Krokodilkungs apsola Floresas kundzei rūpēties par viņas dārgo augu, bet visu laiku atliek to uz vēlāku.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Rabla komanda

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni uzbūvē frizētavu, lai sapostu vectēvu Grantu, taču gadās misēklis.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora uzzina, ka viņas vecmamma nav svinējusi savus Pieaugšanas svētkus, un sarīko viņai pārsteiguma ballīti ar īpašu kleitu, diadēmu un kurpēm! Doras draugam Koko nav aizraujoša stāsta, ar ko izklaidēt biedrus, tāpēc viņi dodas pie Pastāstu koka!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala rīko lielo talantu konkursu. Katram barbabērnam uz skatuves jādemonstrē savs lielākais talants, nekādas nīkuļošanas! // Videospēles ir jautras, bet jāmāk izbaudīt jauki laikapstākļi. Vecāki izlemj bērniem radīt jautras rotaļas ārā. Bet lomas un mīklas jādala uzmanīgi, lai nerodas pārsteīgumi.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo noķer mistisku maskētu vandāli, kurš cenšas bēgt pēc mājas apzīmēšanas. Pie lietas ķeras detektīvs un doktors. // Barbabravo mīļākā mašīna pazūd no viesistabas. To meklējot Barbabravo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais zem dīvāna atrod dīvainu caurumu. Ja nu mašīna aizkrita līdz zemes centram?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Nē! Nē! Tas nav beidzies! Barbabravo nav mazs, viņš ir liels puika! No šis dienas viņš tā arī dzīvos - nekādu snaudu, uzkodu un spēlēšanās ar brāļiem un māsām. // Barbabērni pirmoreiz dodas uz lielveikalu. Tik daudz preču, lieliska vieta! Bet kāpēc viss satīts plastmasas plēvēs?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Karla pirātu tematikas restorāns nonāk vētrainos ūdeņos, kucēni dodas jūrā ar jaunu būvniecības risinājumu. // Sjerra Spīdošā lūdz Rabla komandas palīdzību, lai Celtnieklīcī uzbūvētu īpašu piedzīvojumu visiem saviem faniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda grib palīdzēt atvērt jaunu restorānu visiem ātrsoļotājiem, bet viņi nevar izlemt, kādu restorānu būvēt! // Kad vectētiņš Grants jūtas apslimis, Rabla komanda ķeras pie darba, lai pagatavotu viņa firmas zupu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pēc sniegota pārsteiguma pienākšanas, Rabla komanda piedāvā palīdzēt Hedlija viesnīcā. Kad kāpnes izrādās nepietiekami ātras, ir laiks celt.

programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims izmēģina jaunus raķešzābakus, kas drīz kļūst nekontrolējami. Tims, Tomijs un Tija pieskata mēness papagaili. Tims, Tomijs un Tija sacenšas ar vecākiem astesbumbā.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda palīdz Riveram uzņemt daudz fotogrāfiju foto konkursam, uzbūvējot ļoti ātru veidu, kā pārvietoties pa Celtnieklīci. Rabls un ķepaiņi palīdz Karlam pagatavot saldējumu visiem. Ja vien Ātrmeistars viņiem netraucēs...

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ir Draudzības diena! Kad Ātrmeistara dāvana Makrupuča kungam noiet greizi, viņam jālūdz Rabla komandas palīdzība. Rabla komanda palīdz Lūkasam uzbūvēt lieliskāko Zinātnes izstādes vulkānu. Vai Vingsija stāsies izvirduma ceļā?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš pieskata krokodilu bērneļus. Dora un Zābaciņš pierunā Trolli nogaršot empanadu Benija kioskā. Zābaciņš uzlaiko Tiko izgudrotus zābakus. Dvīņi priecājas par savu pirmo pinjatu, bet neviens nezina, kā to dabūt vaļā.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērniem patīk nakts pasaciņas, bet ne tad, ja tās visu laiku atkārtojas. Barbabella pavada nemierīgu nakti kukaiņu dēļ.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls un viņa celtnieksuņu ģimene gatavojas būvēt tiltu, taču nelietīgajam Ātrmeistaram ir cita ideja. Rabla komandai jāstrādā kopā un jāizglābj visi, uzbūvējot jaunu, drošu tiltu uz Celtnieklīci.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Zābaciņš grib paaugties lielāks, lai drīkstētu vizināties karuseļos - taču kļūst milzīgs! Dora viņam palīdz atgūt ierasto izmēru. Mugursomai ir īpaša dāvana Dorai, bet tā nevar atvērties! Draugi dodas lūgt palīdzību vecmāmiņai.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Omīte uzadīja Timam cepuri, taču tā nemitīgi traucē.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Reksu ģimene dodas ceļojumā cauri galaktikai, lai nokļūtu Raķešpasaulē.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja cīnās par Terijas rezerves biļeti uz Kosmoslendu.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo kā slepenais aģents vada izmeklēšanu, bruņojies ar saviem rīkiem, lai uzzinātu, kurš nozaga Barbatēta torti.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs baidās, ka tiks spiests izvēlēties starp senu labāko draugu Bazziju un jaunu labāko draudzeni Deiziju. Deizijas un Krokodilkunga vienkāršā mājiņa kokā tiek sarežģīta, kad viņi cenšas to paplašināt draugu dēļ.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: No Piedzīvojumu līča atbrauc Rokijs, lai apciemotu Rabla komandu. Tieši laikā, lai redzētu Celtnieklīča jauno lācēnu! Kad reindžere Roza lūdz palīdzēt ar celtniecību, Ātrmeistars netīšām iznīcina lāču māju. Ķepaiņiem un Rokijam jāglābj situācija.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls un viņa ķepaiņu celtnieku ģimene pārceļas uz kaimiņpilsētu Celtnieklīci, kur viņi dzīvo, rotaļājas un būvē visu kopienai nepieciešamo.

Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ātri jānomazgā Greitvejas dubļainais motocikls! Vīlers un suņi ķeras pie darba, lai uzbūvētu risinājumu pirms sacensībām. Vectēva Grants īpašā diena! Bet, kad nepieciešama suņu palīdzība, viņiem jāmaina vectēva dienas plāni.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Deizija baidās, ka tiks sasaistīta ar Vinstonu uz mūžu, kad viņi sapinas lecamauklā. Deizija un Krokodilkungs palīdz Rolandam atrast draugu, ar kuru iet uz Zīļu šovu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: No kalna izbēdzis āzis izraisa haosu, aprīdams visu, kas pagadās! Bali nekur nav atrodama, un Barbapapa liek lietā savu attapību, meklējot viņu. Viņi pat nenojauš, kāds pārsteigums viņus gaida.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei. Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu. Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kad Barbatēta dzīve parādās Barbamamma un barbabērni, viņa māja paliek par mazu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērniem patīk nakts pasaciņas, bet ne tad, ja tās visu laiku atkārtojas. Barbabella pavada nemierīgu nakti kukaiņu dēļ.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija atrod pazudušu rotaļlietu un sola atgriezt to saimniekam. Kaja gaida, kad brauks ar Nebulatoru, bet Tims nav drošs. Tims un Kaja cenšas nofotografēt maldinošu Kosmosa vaboli.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Motorei vajag palīdzību ugunsdzēsēju depo, pilsētā ierodas jauns ugunsdzēsēju kapteinis, lai apmācītu visus ķepaiņus. Čārdžers grib palīdzēt Sjerrai Spīdošajai ar viņas jauno šovu, bet viņa savainotā ķepa izraisa konusveidīgus sarežģījumus.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī apmetas migrējošu pīļu bars. Rabla komandai jāpalīdz pīlēm uzsākt ceļu uz dienvidiem. Motore nevēlas doties pie dakteres Divas uz veterināro klīniku... tāpēc ķepaiņi uzbūvē īpašu, tikai viņai paredzētu telpu.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora atgriežas ar jauniem, fantastiskiem piedzīvojumiem maģiskajā lietus mežā! Pievienojies visīpašākajam bērnam - pētniekam un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam, kad viņi satiek jaunus draugus! Nekas nav neiespējams! Aiziet!

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī.
